title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIIT Foundation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIIT Foundation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the NIIT Foundation family as a Curriculum Developer in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NIIT Foundation:
NIIT Foundation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Foundation!
